title: malus aegra
intro: Malus aegra, also known as the Chinese crabapple or wild apple, is a species of deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the rose family. The medicinal properties of Malus aegra lie in its bark, which contains a compound called amygdalin that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Malus aegra include its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Malus aegra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
